title: Senior Backend Engineer - Typescript
score_reasoning: Your senior-level distributed systems and payment-focused experience (€2M/month billing engine at Stackflo) translates well to commercetools' payment systems role, and the seniority match is strong. However, the role requires deep TypeScript backend expertise, and your production experience is Python/Go—TypeScript appears only as a portfolio skill or secondary exposure, not commercial production work. London hybrid (3 days/week on-site) is also suboptimal: while London is in Europe, requiring cross-country travel from Berlin for regular office days adds friction beyond your hybrid preference anchored to Berlin. The tech gap on the primary language is material enough to lower fit meaningfully.

red_flags: TypeScript is primary required language; your production backend is Python/Go, not Node.js/TypeScript
Requires MongoDB (document databases)—you have no NoSQL production experience
London hybrid requires cross-border commute from Berlin (suboptimal vs. local hybrid)
Payment domain overlap is strong but not a substitute for the language gap
Advanced IaC (MACH principles, OAuth/SAML) requirements add complexity beyond your current profile
